productDisplayName: Puma Women Future Cat Remix Black Shoes
description: Designed to be worn outside the racetrack, these sneakers from puma's ferrari range embody the excitement and energy of the race. This pair comes with the iconic badge and great motorsport styling. The outsoles with horizontal grips make these shoes ultra comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making it a perfect urban wear.UpperFeatures a low-rise ankle design Premium leather upper for durabilityBold, contrasting formstripe logo outliningAsymmetrical lacing system alleviates pressure pointsTextile lining with cushioned footbed for enhanced comfortRubber outsole embedded onto the heel counter for shock absorptionMidsoleCushioned midsole for comfort and stabilityScuderia Ferrari logo shieldOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with patterns for tractionEmbedded stripes and branding
